files.preview: /* ============================================================ Freedom OS — Base Styles File: css/base.css ============================================================ */ @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap'); @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap'); /* Root Variables */ :root { /* Colors */ --color-bg: #0a0a0f; --color-bg-deep: #08090f; --color-surface: #12121a; --color-surface-elevated: #1a1a25; --color-border: #2a2a3a; --color-border-subtle: #1f1f2e; /* Text */ --color-text: #e8e8f0; --color-text-secondary: #8a8a9a; --color-text-muted: #5a5a6a; --color-text-inverse: #0a0a0f;

/* ============================================================ Freedom OS — Charts File: css/charts.css ============================================================ */ /* Chart Container */ .chart-container { position: relative; width: 100%; background-color: var(--color-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: var(--space-lg); overflow: hidden; } .chart-container canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; } .chart-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: var(--space-lg); flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--space-md); } .chart-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700

/* ============================================================ Freedom OS — Components (POLISHED) File: css/components.css Depends: base.css (variables) Provides: Buttons, inputs, cards, badges, modals, toasts, empty states, tabs, kanban, platform cards, hooks, scripts, calendar, performance, drag-drop + DASHBOARD STYLES Last Updated: 2026-05-10 ============================================================ */ /* ============================================================ BUTTONS ============================================================ */ .btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-radius: var(--radius-md

/* ============================================================ Freedom OS — Layout File: css/layout.css ============================================================ */ /* App Shell */ #app { display: flex; min-height: 100vh; background-color: var(--color-bg); } /* Sidebar */ .sidebar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: var(--sidebar-width); height: 100vh; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); display: flex; flex-direction: column; z-index: 100; transition: width var(--transition-base); overflow: hidden; } .sidebar.collapsed { width: var(--sidebar-collapsed); } .sidebar-header { hei

/* ============================================================ Freedom OS — Mobile Styles File: css/mobile.css Depends: base.css, layout.css, components.css Provides: Mobile header, bottom nav, sidebar drawer, bottom sheets, touch targets, safe areas, offline indicator, save indicator, swipe gestures Last Updated: 2026-05-09 ============================================================ */ :root { --mobile-header-height: 56px; --mobile-nav-height: 72px; --mobile-nav-fab-size: 56px; --safe-top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px); --safe-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px); --safe-left: env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px); --safe-right: env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px); --drawer-width: 280px; --bottom-sheet-radius: 24

/* ============================================================ Freedom OS — Views (POLISHED) File: css/views.css ============================================================ */ /* Generic View Wrapper */ .view { animation: fadeInUp var(--transition-base); } .view-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: var(--space-xl); gap: var(--space-md); flex-wrap: wrap; } .view-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--color-text); text-wrap: balance; } .view-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary); margin-top: var(--space-xs); } .view-actions { display: flex; align-it
